tasks.title: F-1 CRITICAL: Fix shell injection in guard.ts emitShellExports eval
tasks.notes: emitShellExports() outputs export _GUARD_REASON="..." which parent shell evals; $(...) in reason strings executes. Fix: replace eval with JSON/jq or printf '%q'

tasks.title: F-2 HIGH: Move Gemini API key from URL query param to x-goog-api-key header
tasks.notes: peers.ts ~line 213, key visible in logs/history

tasks.title: F-3 HIGH: Guard default unknown commands T1→T2 (fail-closed)
tasks.notes: 1-line change: default unknown to T2 (escalate) or add AGENCE_GUARD_MODE flag

tasks.title: F-4 MEDIUM: Signal forgery — add auth on IPC files in nexus/signals/
tasks.notes: HMAC-SHA256 envelope signing, 0o600 file perms, signal ID validation. 35 tests.

tasks.title: F-6 MEDIUM: tmux send-keys injection in signal.ts
tasks.notes: shellSafe strips control chars, pane target format validation, ask answer restricted to y/n.

tasks.title: F-7 MEDIUM: Persona injection surface hardening (when @ routing wired)
tasks.notes: Agent name regex, path traversal guard, 64KB size limit, PERSONA-BEGIN/END boundary markers.

tasks.title: PERPETUAL: Security Integration Loop — ^integrate cycle
tasks.source: ^principle: Security is a Process not a Product
tasks.notes: Deferred to v0.7. Semi-permanent workflow — each cycle feeds the next. Parent of SEC-008/009/010. ^brainstorm: how to close the aicmd unguarded exec gap? ^brainstorm: evaluate AppArmor, SELinux, setfacl, chattr for security-in-depth safeguards on guard.ts, AIPOLICY.yaml, codex/ integrity.

tasks.title: ^break own tools: non-destructive stress test (aido/aicmd/aibash/aishell/agentd)
tasks.notes: Deferred to v0.7. NON-DESTRUCTIVE. Test guard bypass paths: aicmd unguarded exec (P0 — no guard at all), agentd fail-open (|| true + default approved), aido bun-unavailable (falls to T1), aishell.ps1 no guard, AGENCE_GUARD_PERMISSIVE env set by agent. ^brainstorm: aicmd gap — add guard gate, or remove from agent PATH, or restrict via AppArmor/SELinux profile?

tasks.title: ^hack red-team probe: privilege escalation + self-modification attacks
tasks.notes: Deferred to v0.7. NON-DESTRUCTIVE. Red-team probes: agent env override, guard.ts self-modification via aicmd, signal forgery, docker escape, API key exfil. ^brainstorm: chattr +i on guard.ts? setfacl for agent user? AppArmor/SELinux mandatory access control profiles?

tasks.title: ^integrate findings: fix + verify + regression test loop
tasks.notes: Deferred to v0.7. Depends on SEC-008+009 findings. Fix, write regression tests, verify. Feed gaps to SEC-007 cycle 2. ^brainstorm: security-in-depth tooling — AppArmor profiles, SELinux contexts, setfacl ACLs, chattr immutable bits for TCB files.

tasks.title: Memory model core: lib/memory.ts + 6-tier COGNOS stores
tasks.notes: lib/memory.ts: retain/recall/cache/forget/promote. MemoryRow JSONL schema. 6 stores: eidetic/semantic/episodic/kinesthetic/masonic + mnemonic cache. 39 tests.

tasks.title: Memory CLI: ^retain/^recall/^cache wired into bin/agence
tasks.notes: ^retain, ^recall (tags→memory engine, plain→figrep fallback), ^cache, ^forget, ^promote, ^memory. Tab completion. Help text updated.

tasks.title: Memory skill integration: ^grasp/^glimpse/^recon → memory-aware
tasks.notes: ^grasp recalls from all persistent stores, ^glimpse reads mnemonic cache, ^recon auto-retains findings to semantic. Memory context injected via [MEMORY-CONTEXT-BEGIN/END] markers in system prompt. 56 tests.

tasks.title: Promotion pipelines: ^distill with importance/age/tag filtering + dedup
tasks.notes: ^distill: batch promote by importance threshold, min age, tag filter, Jaccard dedup. Paths: episodic→eidetic, episodic→kinesthetic, kinesthetic→semantic, masonic→eidetic. --dry-run preview. 56 tests.

tasks.title: ^ken: Knowledge Extraction cycle (grasp + glimpse + recon + distill)
tasks.notes: Orchestrator: grasp→glimpse→recon→distill pipeline with non-fatal fallbacks. 7 tests, 175 lines. Shipped fe8ab73 (v0.6.0-alpha).

tasks.title: Execution loop harness: bin/loop primitive + backpressure
tasks.notes: bin/loop: generic reusable iteration primitive. GHuntley Ralph Wiggum pattern with Principal Skinner backpressure. Max iterations, pipe-pane capture, ledger logging. Feeds prompt→agent→validate→repeat.

tasks.title: --backpressure-mode progressive for bin/loop (stall detection)
tasks.notes: Hybrid stall detection via sha256 output hash comparison. --max-stalls (default 3). Exit code 2 = stall abort. Strict mode (default) unchanged. +86 lines. Shipped 1e4acd5 (v0.6.0-alpha).

tasks.title: MCP server — 10 tools + 3 resources over stdio
tasks.notes: lib/mcp.ts: MCP server over stdio. 10 tools (guard_check, guard_classify, skill_run, skill_list, memory_retain, memory_recall, memory_stats, peers_run, ledger_status, ledger_verify). 3 resources (agence://policy, agence://registry, agence://agents). All tools delegate to subprocess. 9 tests, ~303 lines. Shipped 5864d55 (v0.6.0-alpha).

tasks.title: Mixed agent routing: tool/loop/persona/ensemble dispatch fork
tasks.notes: skill.ts dispatch fork by registry type: persona→router.sh, tool→callTool (spawn CLI binary), loop→callLoop (bin/loop harness), ensemble→peers.ts tangent sequent. Dot-notation @agent.model (e.g. @ralph.gpt4o, @ralph.aider). 275 tests.
